examples: The building, designed in a cruciform plan, is defined by three axes: central, longitudinal and vertical.
The cruciform control rod controlling is the main method to control reactivity in the nuclear heating reactor (NHR).
Cruciform - a tree shape that requires its own material so that it can prioritize with the terrain and the surrounding objects.
The Director-General toured the colossal cruciform temple, decorated at its base with terracotta plaques featuring divinities and metaphorical nature motifs.
The plan is a blunted regular cruciform.
